title: Simple wizards
description: Simple wizards is a mod that adds new magic tools
body:
A simple magic mod that allows you to use magic tools for battles.

The mod doesn't try to invent a new magic system, it just lets you throw fireballs. 

- Tip - install JEI

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30666dee3cad522e0bfa9dd32ace17efafa073ab.png)

- Fire staff use Blaze Powder

- Wand & Magic staff use Amethyst Shard
